examples: It never ceases to amaze me how the business world continues to trivialize the world's environmental problems.
It is therefore important to not trivialize your passwords.
This simple example is meant to be illustrative, not to trivialize rollback.
Do the movie's sometimes far-fetched developments (charitable prostitutes, a twister) trivialize the plight of real war veterans?
"Because of the name, we tend to trivialize housekeeping genes, " Dr. Roses says.
